title: Puggicorn's Origin Pack
description: A collection of Origins created by Pug for his friends, shared to the public for whoever wants to use it. (Archived because I am not working on the origins that haven't been released, nor do I plan on updating to the latest fabric versions)
body:
# Current Origins in the pack

## The Naga 🐍
"With deadly venom, and a unique sensitivity to magic, the Naga are agile and quick to adapt to any environment they find themselves in."

Featuring:
- Exothermic body temps (Requires Coldsweat)
- Coil leaping, a versatile movement option that grants I-frames and extra damage.
- Enhanced swim speed and less drown damage.
- Doubled healing.
- Toggleable heat vision.
- Magic amplification and sensitivity.
- Poison immunity.
- Ability to milk fangs for poison.
- Venom that inflicts poison to anything you hit.
